sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَأْتِي الضَّيْفُ، يُقَدِّمُ صَاحِبُ البَيْتِ القَهْوَةَ.
sentences.translation: Kada gost dođe, domaćin poslužuje kafu.
sentences.translationEn: When a guest arrives, the host serves coffee.

sentences.arabic: القَهْوَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ لَهَا طَعْمٌ خَاصٌّ وَرَائِحَةٌ جَمِيلَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa ima poseban okus i lijep miris.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee has a special taste and a beautiful aroma.

sentences.translation: Gost sjedi i mirno pije kafu.
sentences.translationEn: The guest sits and drinks coffee calmly.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ العَادَةُ مُهِمَّةٌ فِي ثَقَافَةِ الضِّيَافَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika je važna u kulturi gostoprimstva.
sentences.translationEn: This habit is important in the culture of hospitality.
